name: Damascus Steel Cobbler Shaker
tagline: The blade-forging technique, turned toward the bar.
description: Each shaker is forged using the same folding technique as Damascus steel blades — 67 layers folded and hammered to produce the signature watered-silk pattern, no two shakers identical. Vacuum-insulated core keeps chill without exterior sweat.

name: Obsidian Glass Mixing Cylinder
tagline: Weighted crystal, engineered for the stir.
description: A hand-blown black crystal mixing cylinder with a weighted base for stability during long stirs and a precision-cut lip for a controlled, silent pour. The opaque black hides the drink's color until it hits the glass — a deliberate piece of theater.

name: Precision Titanium Jigger
description: Milled from aerospace-grade titanium and laser-etched with internal measurement rings from 15ml to 60ml, accurate to within 0.5ml. Anodized in a deep obsidian finish that resists fingerprinting and scratching under bar-speed use.

name: Hand-Carved Ice Chisels
tagline: For sculpting the clearest sphere in the room.
description: A three-piece chisel set forged for directional ice carving — splitting, faceting, and final polishing of clear-cut ice spheres and diamonds. Walnut handles are hand-fitted to each blade tang for balance during repetitive, controlled strikes.
